creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 29-04-2012 18:40, G. Paul Ziemba wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/154254; it has been noted by GNATS.
>
> From: "G. Paul Ziemba"<p-fbsd-bugs@ziemba.us>
> To: Rene Ladan<rene@freebsd.org>
> Cc: bug-followup@freebsd.org
> Subject: Re: ports/154254: [patch] mail/asmail imap login broken with gmail
>   at al.
> Date: Sun, 29 Apr 2012 09:19:53 -0700
>
>   Hmm, Not sure why I didn't notice your earlier note of 18 Aug 2011.
>   Sorry about that.
>
>   Here is my working configuration:
>
>   mailbox {
>       type imap
>       server imap.gmail.com
>       user myemail@gmail.com
>       password mypassword
>       timeout 120
>       update 900
>       persistent no
>       ssl yes
>       # Depends on /usr/ports/security/ca_root_nss being installed
>       trustedCaDir /u/paul/.certs/
>   }

The above still doesn't work for me (i.e. unfetched mail but only dashes 
in asmail):
- tried mypassword "quoted" and unquoted
- tried with and without ssl/trustedCaDir

Looking at my Thunderbird configuration, I think I need pop3 with 
pop.gmail.com but setting "type" and "server" to those values doesn't 
work either.

Maybe someone else should look at this?
